title: U Stock Earnings: Unity Software Beats EPS, Beats Revenue for Q2 2024
text: Unity Software exceeded market expectations on both profitability and top-line growth in the second quarter of 2024. The company demonstrated stronger-than-anticipated performance, with EPS coming in 10 cents better than projected and revenue outperforming consensus estimates. Earnings Per Share (EPS): -$0.32, surpassing analyst expectations of -$0.42. Revenue: $449.26 million, exceeding the analyst estimate of $439.63 million by 2.19%. Summary: Unity Software exceeded market expectations on both profitability and top-line growth in the second quarter of 2024.
